files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info (lines 112-127) and get_ts_language (lines 240-241)
Added tsx extension mapping (lines 56-57) and tsx entry in supported_languages (lines 90-91)

compile_belief: All modifications follow exact specifications and use correct constants (LANGUAGE_TSX, not LANGUAGE_TYPESCRIPT)
compile_belief_reason: All tsx arms use typescript:: namespace for queries (correct pattern, not tsx::), reuse typescript module queries, and properly gate with #[cfg(feature = \"lang-tsx\")]. LANGUAGE_TSX is the correct tree-sitter constant for the JSX variant. The shared pub mod typescript declaration is untouched, as specified.
